synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23330 Oracle Linux 9 httpd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23330
description:
[2.4.62-7.0.1]
- Replace index.html with Oracle's index page oracle_index.html.

[2.4.62-7.2]
- Resolves: RHEL-123850 - mod_proxy_hcheck may stop healthchecks after a child
  process is reclaimed

[2.4.62-7.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-125884 - mod_ssl: allow more fine grained SSL SNI vhost check
  to avoid unnecessary 421 errors after CVE-2025-23048 fix
- mod_ssl: add conf.d/snipolicy.conf to set 'SSLVHostSNIPolicy authonly' default
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23330

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23330.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
httpd-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
httpd-core-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
httpd-devel-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
httpd-filesystem-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
httpd-manual-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
httpd-tools-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
mod_ldap-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
mod_lua-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
mod_proxy_html-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
mod_session-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
mod_ssl-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
httpd-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
httpd-core-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
httpd-devel-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
httpd-filesystem-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
httpd-manual-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.noarch.rpm
httpd-tools-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
mod_ldap-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
mod_lua-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
mod_proxy_html-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
mod_session-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
mod_ssl-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/httpd-2.4.62-7.0.1.el9_7.2.src.rpm



Description of changes:
[2.4.62-7.0.1]
- Replace index.html with Oracle's index page oracle_index.html.

[2.4.62-7.2]
- Resolves: RHEL-123850 - mod_proxy_hcheck may stop healthchecks after a child
  process is reclaimed

[2.4.62-7.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-125884 - mod_ssl: allow more fine grained SSL SNI vhost check
  to avoid unnecessary 421 errors after CVE-2025-23048 fix
- mod_ssl: add conf.d/snipolicy.conf to set 'SSLVHostSNIPolicy authonly' default
